title: Continuous verification/reproducibility eval dashboard across cycles
context: Backlog: track the engine's honesty/integrity metrics over time. This task builds a continuous eval dashboard that tracks provenance coverage, premature-conclusion incidents, budget adherence, closed-sources-ingested, planted-error detection, and reproducibility across cycles, so refusal/provenance integrity is monitored as the corpus grows.
objective: Implement a continuous verification/reproducibility eval dashboard that tracks integrity metrics (provenance coverage, premature-conclusion incidents=0, budget adherence, closed-sources=0, planted-error detection rate, reproducibility) across cycles over time.
acceptanceCriteria: Tracks integrity metrics across cycles: provenance coverage, premature-conclusion incidents (target 0), budget adherence, closed-sources ingested (target 0), planted-error detection rate, and reproducibility
Renders the metrics as a dashboard/time-series so regressions in refusal/provenance integrity are visible
Reuses the existing red-team and reproducibility eval harnesses rather than duplicating them
